description: reCAPTCHA Enterprise is Google Cloud’s bot and fraud protection service for websites and applications. It lets developers assess interactions, manage keys and firewall policies, and work with related account signals.
summary: reCAPTCHA Enterprise exposes one authenticated HTTP API on `https://recaptchaenterprise.googleapis.com` with REST resources for `v1` and `v1beta1`; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found on this domain.
